campagnes de télémarketing, notre client a obtenu 9% de réponses positives pour un rendez-vous. Voici les indicateurs de succès de notre campagne effectuée par notre société de prospection commerciale:</p></div></div></article></div></section></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section class="mt-8 md:mt-10"><div class="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-3"><article class="rounded-[18px] border p-5 md:p-6 border-devlo-200 bg-white shadow-panel"><p class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-4xl">52</p><p class="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">clients potentiels ont manifesté leur intérêt pour un rendez-vous au cours des deux premières campagnes.</p></article><article class="rounded-[18px] border p-5 md:p-6 border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft"><p class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-4xl">36 %</p><p class="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">des clients potentiels contactés ont répondu à nos messages et appels de prospection</p></article></div></section></div></div></section><section class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[72px] md:py-[96px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div class="space-y-6 md:space-y-8"><div data-case-study-sticky-subnav="" class="sticky top-[86px] z-30 hidden md:block"><div class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200/90 bg-white/90 px-4 py-3 shadow-soft backdrop-blur-md"><div class="flex items-center gap-4"><nav aria-label="Navigation de l’étude de cas" class="min-w-0 flex-1"><ul class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2"><li><a href="#a-propos" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-devlo-900 text-white" aria-current="true">À propos</a></li><li><a href="#icp" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">ICP</a></li><li><a href="#defi" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Défis du client</a></li><li><a href="#solutions" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Nos solutions</a></li><li><a href="#resultats" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Résultats</a></li><li><a href="#enseignements" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Principaux enseignements</a></li><li><a href="#contact" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Contact</a></li></ul></nav><a href="#contact-form" data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="subnav" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel min-h-[38px] whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-2 text-xs">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div></div><div class="grid gap-8 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_300px] xl:items-start"><div class="min-w-0 space-y-7"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article id="a-propos" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-7 md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">À propos de notre client</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Basé en Suisse, SquareCo publie sur sa plateforme des analyses professionnelles conçues pour aider les acteurs actifs sur les marchés des biocarburants à mieux comprendre les cadres réglementaires, les tendances du marché et les développements de l’industrie.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article id="defi" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-7 md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Défis du client</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>L’un des principaux défis consistait à identifier les opportunités les plus prometteuses parmi tous les Ideal Customer Profiles (ICP). De nombreuses parties prenantes ont besoin d’analyses professionnelles sur les biocarburants: ces clients potentiels comprennent des entreprises qui produisent, commercialisent, transportent et consomment des biocarburants. Ils opèrent tous dans des secteurs très variés, avec des profils, des besoins et des spécificités différents. Notre client souhaitait identifier les meilleurs Ideal Customer Profiles (ICP).</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Un autre défi majeur était qu’il n’existait pas de système de gestion de la relation client (CRM) enregistrant leurs opérations de vente. Un CRM permet d’accélérer les opérations de vente et de planifier les actions de suivi, ce qui est essentiel.</span></li></ul></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article id="icp" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Les Ideal Customer Profiles</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Biofuel traders, analyste, responsable de la gestion du commerce, responsable des carburants durables et du carbone, coordinateur du négoce et de la gestion des risques, responsable des ventes, directeur commercial.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section id="solutions" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-7 shadow-soft md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Les solutions</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Génération de leads et validation des ICP</strong><br/><span>devlo a analysé de nombreuses sources d’acteurs du secteur des biocarburants (bases de données publiques, groupes LinkedIn, recherches Sales Navigator et autres sources), puis a identifié les organisations les plus intéressantes et les décideurs les plus pertinents. Après chaque campagne, nous avons analysé les leads les plus qualifiés pour générer de nouveaux leads selon les caractéristiques les plus performantes (activité, industrie, taille, fonctions, etc.).</span></span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Configuration CRM, formation et “Single Source of Truth”</strong><br/><span>devlo a configuré le CRM selon les meilleures pratiques, puis a formé le client à son utilisation (tâches de suivi, modèles, documents, etc.). Il était également nécessaire de centraliser et d’enregistrer toutes les opérations de vente (e-mails, réunions, conversations téléphoniques) dans une “Single Source of Truth”.</span></span></li></ul></div></section></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section id="resultats" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-7 shadow-soft md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Nos résultats</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Après 2 campagnes de télémarketing, notre client a obtenu 9% de réponses positives pour un rendez-vous. Voici les indicateurs de succès de notre campagne effectuée par notre société de prospection commerciale:</p></div><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>74% de taux d’ouverture</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>27% de taux de clics</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>37% de taux de réponse</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>9% de taux d’intérêt</span></li></ul></div></section></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section id="enseignements" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-7 shadow-soft md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Principaux enseignements</h2><div class="mt-6 grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2"><article class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-devlo-50/70 p-5"><div class="flex items-center gap-3"><span class="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-xs font-bold text-devlo-800 ring-1 ring-neutral-200">1</span><p class="text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-800"><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Exclure les entreprises les moins qualifiées entre les campagnes</strong><br/><span>Les entreprises concentrées exclusivement sur le biogaz ont été exclues car elles ne présentaient aucun intérêt pour l’offre.</span></p></div></article><article class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-devlo-50/70 p-5"><div class="flex items-center gap-3"><span class="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-xs font-bold text-devlo-800 ring-1 ring-neutral-200">2</span><p class="text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-800"><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Prendre en compte le retour d’information des prospects et du client</strong><br/><span>Pour deux ICPs très intéressés par la proposition de valeur, le client a créé une nouvelle plateforme. Nous avons fait une pause entre la 2e et la 3e campagne pour attendre qu’elle soit prête avant de communiquer dessus.</span></p></div></article><article class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-devlo-50/70 p-5"><div class="flex items-center gap-3"><span class="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-xs font-bold text-devlo-800 ring-1 ring-neutral-200">3</span><p class="text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-800"><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Personnaliser les messages pour améliorer la délivrabilité</strong><br/><span>Il est essentiel de personnaliser fortement les messages (prénoms, noms, syntaxe liquide, etc.) afin d’éviter qu’ils soient détectés par les filtres antispams.</span></p></div></article></div></section></div></div><aside class="hidden xl:block"><div class="sticky top-[154px] space-y-4"><div class="rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-soft"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Conversion</p><p class="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-700">Planifiez une rencontre pour obtenir un plan outbound adapté à votre marché et vos objectifs commerciaux.</p><div class="mt-4 space-y-2"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="sidebar" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel w-full justify-center px-4 py-2.5 text-xs" href="#contact-form">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div><div class="rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-soft"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">KPIs</p><ul class="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-neutral-700"><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>74% de taux d’ouverture</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>27% de taux de clics</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>37% de taux de réponse</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>9% de taux d’intérêt</span></li></ul></div></div></aside></div></div></div></section><section id="contact" class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[80px] md:py-[110px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><div class="mx-auto max-w-[980px] rounded-[22px] border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-panel md:p-8"><div class="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,0.95fr)_minmax(0,1.05fr)] lg:items-start"><div class="min-w-0"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-devlo-700">Contact</p><h2 class="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-3xl">Comment obtenir plus de rendez-vous : parlons-en</h2><p class="mt-4 text-sm leading-7 text-neutral-600 md:text-base md:leading-8">Oui. En plus de piloter des campagnes externalisées, devlo peut former les commerciaux B2B, SDR et BDR aux techniques de prospection modernes. Cette formation couvre des sujets comme la rédaction de cold emails, la téléprospection, la prospection LinkedIn, la prospection multicanal, la qualification des leads et la gestion du pipeline. L&#x27;objectif est d&#x27;aider les équipes commerciales internes à adopter une méthodologie de développement commercial B2B reproductible et à améliorer leurs résultats.</p><div class="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="final" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel px-5 py-3 text-sm" href="#contact-form">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div><div id="contact-form" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-50/60 p-4 md:p-5"><div class="relative"><div class="flex min-h-[320px] items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-neutral-50"><div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 text-neutral-400"><div class="h-8 w-8 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-200 border-t-devlo-600"></div><span class="text-sm">Chargement du formulaire…</span></div></div><div Voici les indicateurs de succès de notre campagne effectuée par notre société de prospection commerciale:</p></div></div></article></div></section></div><div ont manifesté leur intérêt pour un rendez-vous au cours des deux premières campagnes.</p></article><article class="rounded-[18px] border p-5 md:p-6 border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft"><p class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-4xl">36 %</p><p class="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">des clients potentiels contactés ont répondu à nos messages et appels de prospection</p></article></div></section></div></div></section><section class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[72px] md:py-[96px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div class="space-y-6 md:space-y-8"><div data-case-study-sticky-subnav="" class="sticky top-[86px] z-30 hidden md:block"><div class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200/90 bg-white/90 px-4 py-3 shadow-soft backdrop-blur-md"><div class="flex items-center gap-4"><nav aria-label="Navigation de l’étude de cas" class="min-w-0 flex-1"><ul class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2"><li><a href="#a-propos" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-devlo-900 text-white" aria-current="true">À propos</a></li><li><a href="#icp" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">ICP</a></li><li><a href="#defi" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Défis du client</a></li><li><a href="#solutions" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Nos solutions</a></li><li><a href="#resultats" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Résultats</a></li><li><a href="#enseignements" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Principaux enseignements</a></li><li><a href="#contact" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 hover:bg-devlo-100 hover:text-devlo-800">Contact</a></li></ul></nav><a href="#contact-form" data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="subnav" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel min-h-[38px] whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-2 text-xs">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div></div><div class="grid gap-8 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_300px] xl:items-start"><div class="min-w-0 space-y-7"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article id="a-propos" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-7 md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">À propos de notre client</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Basé en Suisse, SquareCo publie sur sa plateforme des analyses professionnelles conçues pour aider les acteurs actifs sur les marchés des biocarburants à mieux comprendre les cadres réglementaires, les tendances du marché et les développements de l’industrie.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article id="defi" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-7 md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Défis du client</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>L’un des principaux défis consistait à identifier les opportunités les plus prometteuses parmi tous les Ideal Customer Profiles (ICP). De nombreuses parties prenantes ont besoin d’analyses professionnelles sur les biocarburants: ces clients potentiels comprennent des entreprises qui produisent, commercialisent, transportent et consomment des biocarburants. Ils opèrent tous dans des secteurs très variés, avec des profils, des besoins et des spécificités différents. Notre client souhaitait identifier les meilleurs Ideal Customer Profiles (ICP).</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Un autre défi majeur était qu’il n’existait pas de système de gestion de la relation client (CRM) enregistrant leurs opérations de vente. Un CRM permet d’accélérer les opérations de vente et de planifier les actions de suivi, ce qui est essentiel.</span></li></ul></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article id="icp" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Les Ideal Customer Profiles</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Biofuel traders, analyste, responsable de la gestion du commerce, responsable des carburants durables et du carbone, coordinateur du négoce et de la gestion des risques, responsable des ventes, directeur commercial.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section id="solutions" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-7 shadow-soft md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Les solutions</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Génération de leads et validation des ICP</strong><br/><span>devlo a analysé de nombreuses sources d’acteurs du secteur des biocarburants (bases de données publiques, groupes LinkedIn, recherches Sales Navigator et autres sources), puis a identifié les organisations les plus intéressantes et les décideurs les plus pertinents. Après chaque campagne, nous avons analysé les leads les plus qualifiés pour générer de nouveaux leads selon les caractéristiques les plus performantes (activité, industrie, taille, fonctions, etc.).</span></span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Configuration CRM, formation et “Single Source of Truth”</strong><br/><span>devlo a configuré le CRM selon les meilleures pratiques, puis a formé le client à son utilisation (tâches de suivi, modèles, documents, etc.). Il était également nécessaire de centraliser et d’enregistrer toutes les opérations de vente (e-mails, réunions, conversations téléphoniques) dans une “Single Source of Truth”.</span></span></li></ul></div></section></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section id="resultats" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-7 shadow-soft md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Nos résultats</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Après 2 campagnes de télémarketing, notre client a obtenu 9% de réponses positives pour un rendez-vous. Voici les indicateurs de succès de notre campagne effectuée par notre société de prospection commerciale:</p></div><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>74% de taux d’ouverture</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>27% de taux de clics</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>37% de taux de réponse</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>9% de taux d’intérêt</span></li></ul></div></section></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><section id="enseignements" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-7 shadow-soft md:p-9"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Principaux enseignements</h2><div class="mt-6 grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2"><article class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-devlo-50/70 p-5"><div class="flex items-center gap-3"><span class="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-xs font-bold text-devlo-800 ring-1 ring-neutral-200">1</span><p class="text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-800"><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Exclure les entreprises les moins qualifiées entre les campagnes</strong><br/><span>Les entreprises concentrées exclusivement sur le biogaz ont été exclues car elles ne présentaient aucun intérêt pour l’offre.</span></p></div></article><article class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-devlo-50/70 p-5"><div class="flex items-center gap-3"><span class="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-xs font-bold text-devlo-800 ring-1 ring-neutral-200">2</span><p class="text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-800"><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Prendre en compte le retour d’information des prospects et du client</strong><br/><span>Pour deux ICPs très intéressés par la proposition de valeur, le client a créé une nouvelle plateforme. Nous avons fait une pause entre la 2e et la 3e campagne pour attendre qu’elle soit prête avant de communiquer dessus.</span></p></div></article><article class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-devlo-50/70 p-5"><div class="flex items-center gap-3"><span class="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-xs font-bold text-devlo-800 ring-1 ring-neutral-200">3</span><p class="text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-800"><strong class="font-semibold text-devlo-900">Personnaliser les messages pour améliorer la délivrabilité</strong><br/><span>Il est essentiel de personnaliser fortement les messages (prénoms, noms, syntaxe liquide, etc.) afin d’éviter qu’ils soient détectés par les filtres antispams.</span></p></div></article></div></section></div></div><aside class="hidden xl:block"><div class="sticky top-[154px] space-y-4"><div class="rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-soft"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Conversion</p><p class="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-700">Planifiez une rencontre pour obtenir un plan outbound adapté à votre marché et vos objectifs commerciaux.</p><div class="mt-4 space-y-2"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="sidebar" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel w-full justify-center px-4 py-2.5 text-xs" href="#contact-form">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div><div class="rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-soft"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">KPIs</p><ul class="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-neutral-700"><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>74% de taux d’ouverture</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>27% de taux de clics</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>37% de taux de réponse</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>9% de taux d’intérêt</span></li></ul></div></div></aside></div></div></div></section><section id="contact" class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[80px] md:py-[110px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><div class="mx-auto max-w-[980px] rounded-[22px] border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-panel md:p-8"><div class="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,0.95fr)_minmax(0,1.05fr)] lg:items-start"><div class="min-w-0"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-devlo-700">Contact</p><h2 class="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-3xl">Comment obtenir plus de rendez-vous : parlons-en</h2><p class="mt-4 text-sm leading-7 text-neutral-600 md:text-base md:leading-8">Oui. En plus de piloter des campagnes externalisées, devlo peut former les commerciaux B2B, SDR et BDR aux techniques de prospection modernes. Cette formation couvre des sujets comme la rédaction de cold emails, la téléprospection, la prospection LinkedIn, la prospection multicanal, la qualification des leads et la gestion du pipeline. L&#x27;objectif est d&#x27;aider les équipes commerciales internes à adopter une méthodologie de développement commercial B2B reproductible et à améliorer leurs résultats.</p><div class="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="final" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all py-3 text-sm" href="#contact-form">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div><div id="contact-form" class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Leads contacted</p></article></div></section></div></div></section><section class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[72px] md:py-[96px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div class="space-y-6 md:space-y-8"><div data-case-study-sticky-subnav="" class="sticky top-[86px] z-30 hidden md:block"><div class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200/90 bg-white/90 px-4 py-3 shadow-soft backdrop-blur-md"><div class="flex items-center gap-4"><nav aria-label="Navigation de l’étude de cas" class="min-w-0 flex-1"><ul class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2"><li><a href="#contact" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-devlo-900 text-white" aria-current="true">Contact</a></li></ul></nav><a href="#contact-form" data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="subnav" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel min-h-[38px] whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-2 text-xs">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div></div><div class="grid gap-8 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_300px] xl:items-start"><div class="min-w-0 space-y-7"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">About the Company</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Monizze is a leading Belgian provider of digital employee benefits, including meal vouchers, eco vouchers, gift vouchers, and sports vouchers.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">The Challenge</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Monizze previously relied only on cold calling through an external partner and had no internal outbound capabilities. They lacked the resources to run a structured outbound campaign targeting their full TAM.</p><p>Their past partner delivered more meetings, but with lead quality issues and higher no-show rates.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">The Strategy</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Implemented a multichannel outbound approach using email + LinkedIn.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Focused targeting on companies that are members of certain associations in Belgium.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Prioritized Tier 1 decision makers: HR Managers, representing over 60% of all contacts reached.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>End-to-end inbox management with proactive and reactive responses, nurturing, and pre-qualification.</span></li></ul></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Results</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>6,000+ leads contacted</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>120 meetings booked (1.6% meeting rate)</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Near-zero no-show rate thanks to inbox follow-ups</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>152 people expressed clear interest</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>96-99% email deliverability</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>62.3% peaks of open rate on targeted batches</span></li></ul></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Client Testimonial</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>&quot;Working with devlo has been a real pleasure. Communication was very smooth and the team was always responsive when needed. Their personalized approach allowed us to combine volume and quality, even though the target audience was difficult to reach. There were virtually no no-shows, and appointments were always qualified and effective. The lessons learned from the campaigns are also instructive and very valuable.&quot;</p><p>Anthony Crémer, Revenue Ops Analyst at Monizze</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Key Takeaways</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Timing and targeting mattered far more than heavy personalization.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Choosing the right companies and decision makers drove most of the success.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Inbox management was a critical success factor, contributing to the ultra-low no-show rate.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Quality &gt; Quantity: fewer meetings, but significantly more valuable outcomes.</span></li></ul></div></article></div></div><aside class="hidden xl:block"><div class="sticky top-[154px] space-y-4"><div class="rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-soft"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Conversion</p><p class="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-700">Planifiez une rencontre pour obtenir un plan outbound adapté à votre marché et vos objectifs commerciaux.</p><div class="mt-4 space-y-2"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="sidebar" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>6,000+ leads contacted</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>120 meetings booked (1.6% meeting rate)</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Near-zero no-show rate thanks to inbox follow-ups</span></li><li class="flex gap-2"><span class="mt-2 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>152 people expressed clear interest</span></li></ul></div></div></aside></div></div></div></section><section id="contact" class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[80px] md:py-[110px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><div class="mx-auto max-w-[980px] rounded-[22px] border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-panel md:p-8"><div class="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,0.95fr)_minmax(0,1.05fr)] lg:items-start"><div class="min-w-0"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-devlo-700">Contact</p><h2 class="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-3xl">Comment obtenir plus de rendez-vous : parlons-en</h2><p class="mt-4 text-sm leading-7 text-neutral-600 md:text-base md:leading-8">Oui. En plus de piloter des campagnes externalisées, devlo peut former les commerciaux B2B, SDR et BDR aux techniques de prospection modernes. Cette formation couvre des sujets comme la rédaction de cold emails, la téléprospection, la prospection LinkedIn, la prospection multicanal, la qualification des leads et la gestion du pipeline. L&#x27;objectif est d&#x27;aider les équipes commerciales internes à adopter une méthodologie de développement commercial B2B reproductible et à améliorer leurs résultats.</p><div class="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="final" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all class="rounded-[18px] border p-5 md:p-6 border-devlo-200 bg-white shadow-panel"><p class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-4xl">120</p><p class="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Meetings booked</p></article><article class="rounded-[18px] border p-5 md:p-6 border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft"><p class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-4xl">7,000</p><p class="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Decision-makers targeted</p></article><article class="rounded-[18px] border p-5 md:p-6 border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft"><p class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-4xl">6,000+</p><p class="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Leads contacted</p></article></div></section></div></div></section><section class="bg-devlo-50 py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 py-[72px] md:py-[96px]"><div class="mx-auto w-full max-w-[1400px] px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-8"><div class="space-y-6 md:space-y-8"><div data-case-study-sticky-subnav="" class="sticky top-[86px] z-30 hidden md:block"><div class="rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200/90 bg-white/90 px-4 py-3 shadow-soft backdrop-blur-md"><div class="flex items-center gap-4"><nav aria-label="Navigation de l’étude de cas" class="min-w-0 flex-1"><ul class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2"><li><a href="#contact" class="inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-colors bg-devlo-900 text-white" aria-current="true">Contact</a></li></ul></nav><a href="#contact-form" data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="subnav" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-devlo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-devlo-800 text-white hover:bg-devlo-900 shadow-soft hover:shadow-panel min-h-[38px] whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-2 text-xs">Obtenir un plan outbound similaire lors d’une rencontre</a></div></div></div><div class="grid gap-8 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_300px] xl:items-start"><div class="min-w-0 space-y-7"><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">About the Company</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Monizze is a leading Belgian provider of digital employee benefits, including meal vouchers, eco vouchers, gift vouchers, and sports vouchers.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">The Challenge</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>Monizze previously relied only on cold calling through an external partner and had no internal outbound capabilities. They lacked the resources to run a structured outbound campaign targeting their full TAM.</p><p>Their past partner delivered more meetings, but with lead quality issues and higher no-show rates.</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">The Strategy</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Implemented a multichannel outbound approach using email + LinkedIn.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Focused targeting on companies that are members of certain associations in Belgium.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Prioritized Tier 1 decision makers: HR Managers, representing over 60% of all contacts reached.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>End-to-end inbox management with proactive and reactive responses, nurturing, and pre-qualification.</span></li></ul></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Results</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>6,000+ leads contacted</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>120 meetings booked (1.6% meeting rate)</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Near-zero no-show rate thanks to inbox follow-ups</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>152 people expressed clear interest</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>96-99% email deliverability</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>62.3% peaks of open rate on targeted batches</span></li></ul></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Client Testimonial</h2><div class="mt-4"><div class="space-y-4 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><p>&quot;Working with devlo has been a real pleasure. Communication was very smooth and the team was always responsive when needed. Their personalized approach allowed us to combine volume and quality, even though the target audience was difficult to reach. There were virtually no no-shows, and appointments were always qualified and effective. The lessons learned from the campaigns are also instructive and very valuable.&quot;</p><p>Anthony Crémer, Revenue Ops Analyst at Monizze</p></div></div></article></div><div style="opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)"><article class="scroll-mt-[170px] rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white shadow-soft p-6 md:p-7"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-2xl">Key Takeaways</h2><div class="mt-4"><ul class="mt-5 space-y-3 text-[15px] leading-8 text-neutral-700 md:text-base"><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Timing and targeting mattered far more than heavy personalization.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Choosing the right companies and decision makers drove most of the success.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Inbox management was a critical success factor, contributing to the ultra-low no-show rate.</span></li><li class="flex gap-3"><span class="mt-3 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-devlo-700"></span><span>Quality &gt; Quantity: fewer meetings, but significantly more valuable outcomes.</span></li></ul></div></article></div></div><aside class="hidden xl:block"><div class="sticky top-[154px] space-y-4"><div class="rounded-panel border border-neutral-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-soft"><p class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-neutral-500">Conversion</p><p class="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-neutral-700">Planifiez une rencontre pour obtenir un plan outbound adapté à votre marché et vos objectifs commerciaux.</p><div class="mt-4 space-y-2"><a data-case-study-cta="" data-case-study-cta-variant="sidebar" class="inline-flex min-h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold class="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-devlo-900 md:text-3xl">Comment obtenir plus de rendez-vous : parlons-en</h2><p class="mt-4 text-sm leading-7 text-neutral-600 md:text-base md:leading-8">Oui. En plus de piloter des campagnes externalisées, devlo peut former les commerciaux B2B, SDR et BDR aux techniques de prospection modernes. Cette formation couvre des sujets comme la rédaction de cold emails, la téléprospection, la prospection LinkedIn, la prospection multicanal, la qualification des leads et la gestion du pipeline. L&#x27;objectif est d&#x27;aider les équipes commerciales internes à adopter une méthodologie de développement commercial B2B reproductible et à améliorer leurs résultats.</p><div class="mt-5 flex
